contentPattern.structure: header row (title + product columns: icon+name+features-link) | feature rows (name+description + yes/no tick per product) | optional footer row (buy-now link per product)

suitableFor: spec/feature comparison tables with tick/cross glyphs
multi-product 'choose your plan' comparison grids with per-product CTAs
notSuitableFor: simple data tables with plain text cells (use base 'table' block)

structuralAssets: tick/cross glyph (inline SVG, baked into CSS)
platform icons (Windows / Windows Server) — structural, baked
product icons 50x50 — treated as structural glyphs
authoredContent: Buy now (commerce store) hrefs — preserve verbatim, backend-dependent/out of scope
